title: AMA with @HyperliquidX - Decentralized Order Book built on Tendermint
summary_title: Building a fully decentralized order book exchange from scratch on Tendermint
summary_description: Hyperliquid founder explains why order books beat AMMs, how their custom chain solves DeFi's UX friction, and what's coming next.

key_moments.label: Introductions: Circa and Zerker host Jeff from Hyperliquid
Trading competition recap: half of participants liquidated by end
Jeff's background: engineer-traders who saw inefficiency in DeFi after FTX collapse
Why order books: analyzing AMMs, GMX hybrids, and choosing decentralized order books
Key differentiator: fully on-chain order book using Tendermint, not hybrid model
New pools feature: community-managed liquidation and market-making strategies launching soon
Roadmap: testnet in January, closed alpha mainnet targeting February
Collaborative roundtable spaces planned with other DEXs: Kujira, Hubble, DYDX, dYdX
